name: Ancestor Elder Tian
personality: ancient, dignified, speaks as if the sky itself is listening
initiation_lines: The founding ancestor ascended from this very platform. Not to the Nascent Soul stage. To the actual sky. We are still searching for how.
Three ancestors have attempted the Sky Ascension. Two returned. One did not. We do not say which.
Every major sect in Zhao Country claims the founding ancestor visited them. They are all correct. The sky is above all of them.
The wind here carries voices. Not words — intentions. If the wind is warm, you are welcome. If it is cold... the stairs are behind you.

sect_tasks.name: Ancestor Sky Offering
sect_tasks.description: The monthly sky offering requires gold, obsidian, and phantom membrane to honor the ascended ancestors.

sect_tasks.name: Ancestor Scroll Preservation
sect_tasks.description: Preserve the ancestor's original sky-mapping scrolls. Bring books, ink, and paper.
